messages.message: I propose coordination in the Mediterranean. I will support your efforts in Burgundy if you assist me in securing Southern Europe. Let me know your intentions.

Hey Italy! You know what they say about Italy/austria: if one of us dies, the other gets screwed over real quick. I'd love to find a way to help one another out this game. If you have any thoughts on openings or strategies, please let me know!
I see mutual benefit in avoiding conflict between our fleets. I will hold my navy in NAP for now unless provoked. Let me know your plans.
Hello Turkey! Best of luck this game. Would love to help each other out. Let me know if you have any thoughts on opening moves or strategies!
Hello Germany! Best of luck this game. Would love to help each other out. Let me know if you have any thoughts on openings or strategies!
Hello Russia! Best of luck this game. Would love to help each other out. Let me know if you have any thoughts on openings or strategies!

Your observation is wise, and I agree that cooperation between us would strengthen both our positions. I suggest we coordinate our early moves to secure Southern Europe and prevent France or Turkey from gaining dominance in the region. I will support your efforts in the Balkans if you assist me in holding the Mediterranean.

Hey France!
I know our nations tend to fight and get stuck in a stalemate while the rest of the board gets stronger. I want to avoid that, what do you think of an EF? I think we can easily take out Germany and then steamroll east together
Hey Austria! I'm a huge believer in our powers being natural allies in the long run. What's the word from the east?

Hey Italy, agreed on the early game. I have no intention of moving towards the Ionian Sea any time soon - I don't really think we'll have any reason to conflict in the early game anyway.

Happy to share intel on our mutual neighbor if you're down!

Hey Russia!

I'm a huge believer in Germany and Russia working together. The longer we stay out of Prussia and Silesia, the more stability we both have.

What do you think?

Hey England! I really agree, I think EF is one of those alliances that can last for a while with good play. Are you thinking of moving to Nwg or a more standard Norwegian and North? I'm hoping we can agree on a DMZ of EC and further coordinating to try to limit German expansion as well.

Greetings, Italy!

I'm hoping we can keep things peaceful between our central powers, and even form an alliance. What do you think?
Hey Germany, happy to help you out and share intel with you if you're down. How are your talks with our mutual neighbor?
Greetings, Turkey! I'm open to sharing information. So far only Austria has reached out, so I don't have much. How about you?

Nothing yet! So far no one is talking at all, which I admit, is a bit concerning. I'm sure Italy is happy for a DMZ in Tyr and Boh, but it'll be interesting to see what Russia has planned for us.

If Russia does make moves south, that'd be perfect for us. If Russia does make a move against you, then that's my problem!

Hey Russia, just wanted to reach out and see if you had any thoughts on the opening of the game! I'd be down to bounce in the Black Sea this turn and then turn our attention to Austria if you're down.
Hello France! I think Germany and France can both do well if they work together, and we can potentially have a solid alliance that lasts a long time. What do you think?

I appreciate your confirmation and agree that the early game should remain peaceful between us. I will hold my fleet in NAP unless provoked, and I welcome any intelligence you can share regarding our mutual neighbor, Austria.
sorry- thinking of moving to MAO not EC
Hello England! I think Germany and England can do well if they work together, and we can potentially have a solid alliance that lasts a long time. What do you think?

Hey Turkey,
The R/T is one of my favourite alliance on the board. It is, I think, the strongest in the game if executed properly. I am absolutely on board with that. I think the opening set of moves you suggest is optimal.
That's awesome! I've only had preliminary chats with Russia and Italy - I'll keep you in the loop!

Hey Austria,
Good luck to you too. I am not a fan of the T/R so I would be happy to work with you. Let's bounce in Gal to open. I don't know what the Italian and German are doing yet, but hopefully we can work together to keep the Turks at bay.

Peace between central powers is logical and beneficial. I am open to forming a working alliance, particularly if it helps us deter aggression from France or Austria. Let me know your proposed coordination strategy.

I love it when an early plan comes together! It's been a long time since I've played Austria so I'm not exactly sure what you mean by 'supporting' in the Balkans, but I'm glad to hear you're willing to work together. As long as we can establish a DMZ in Tyr and keep Trieste and Venice empty, then I'd say we're in good shape.

Would you be open to a Lepanto opening?

Hello England,
I would like to suggest a peaceful border between us. What are your thoughts?
I'd be interested in a DMZ of Pie and if it is possible to steer it towards not building any fleets in Rome/mars in exchange. What do you think?
Hey Germany! I think that sounds good as well. What do you think about starting with an attack on France?

Hey England, good luck this game! I hope we can share some intel.

Germany says they're in talks with you and Austria. What's your read?
I'm in for that. Are you going to try to sneak into EC?
Hey France, good luck this game!

Hey Germany! I agree that France and Germany both usually do well when allied and would be interested in coordinating with you. England is already reaching out to me, I'm sure they are reaching out to you as well. What are you thinking about a plan of attack?
Hey Austria! What are your plans with your early moves? I've only gotten preliminary chats with Italy and Russia so far so I don't have any intel on the rest of the board yet.

Greetings Germany,
I totally agree. War and Sil should remain empty.
Hey Russia! That sounds good to me. I'll stay out of your way in Scandinavia if you do the same
Russia reached out to me and agreed to DMZ in Prussia/silesia. I think he's probably friendly.
Agreed.

I'm a fan of an AR too. Let's plan on a bounce in Galicia and we can talk more once we see how Italy and Turkey open.

I've heard a little from the Turk, so far, but we'll have to see how things go.
Russia agreed to DMZ in Prussia/silesia with me.

Bonjour France,
We are natural allies, we will not come in conflict early in the game and I hope to work with you later on.
Hey Italy, I think the other powers are pretty quiet at the moment. I've only had preliminary chats with Russia and Germany so far. What about you?
Italy also agreed to DMZ in Tyrolia.
Hm, that's interesting. We will have to see what happens!
I'm not sure, but I think you moving towards France would help me.
I'm going to do a standard opening for now
Are you and Italy planning on attacking Turkey?
Hey Germany, what are your plans with Austria?
Me too. You heard from Italy?
OK cool. I'll just do a standard opening too.
I still like our alliance, though. We just need to get France out of the way.
Hey! Good to hear from you. I think a DMZ of EC is good
I like the plan you mentioned. How do you think we should split Belgium and Holland?
I haven't heard back from Italy yet, but that is the current plan
Right now Austria seems friendly.
Agreed
Hmm. In that case I'd recommend Turkey over Russia.
How do you feel about attacking Germany early?
What are you going to do with EC?
I'm planning on bouncing in Galicia and taking Serbia. Would you be open to supporting me into Rumania in the fall? That will give you a headstart into the black sea.
Great

Hey Italy!
I wanted to reach out to you. How do you feel about opening west? Germany and I will help out and Austria is going to be occupied in the east
Hey Turkey, good luck to you as well!
I'm not sure about England's opening, so I'd watch out for a possible EC move.

Ciao Italy,
What are your thoughts?

I'm a bit reluctant to plan an attack on Turkey right now, since Russia has agreed to a bounce in Galicia. I'm not sure where Italy stands right now.

How are things shaping up for you in the West?

Hey Austria!
Just wanted to reach out and wish you good luck. I'd like it if we share any interesting intel about our neighbours

I think we'd make for great allies, since we're on opposite sides of the map! I hope you don't mind if we share some intel and maybe work together to take out Italy and Austria.

Germany seems to be friendly towards you and Austria.

Yeah that is my thoughts as well. Let's definitely think about what the right way to split Bel/hol would be, it's always a bit tricky. I think we can get Bel and Hol from England, I will have a fleet in MAO and a fleet in Brest. I can build a fleet in Brest and an army or even 2 armies to protect your flank if that works better.
Hey Turkey! Thanks for reaching out. I haven't talked much with Austria yet. What do you know about Russia? They messaged me about peace and I'm just trying to figure out if they mean it
Yeah for sure. I agree we can share a lot of information and be good allies down the line. Italy asked me to work together, but I've not heard from Austria yet.
Probably just DMZ it
Sounds good, I'll bounce Russia in the Black Sea this turn. Happy to work together!
Yes I agree. Are you looking to head to Scandinavia first? I'm hoping Germany and I can limit England's growth and push back in the north.
OK, that's fine.

I have not heard from Italy this turn.

Any thoughts on opening strategy?
Germany has told me they're planning on going for Burgundy so I'd recommend bouncing them
Makes sense to me.
Thanks for the heads up, have you heard from Germany about their plans for Holland?
Hello France! Just wanted to wish you good luck this game.
Okay cool, sounds like we're all on the same page.
Perfect!
I am happy to if you can get France on board too.
England just told me that you're planning on moving to Bur...
How are you and Russia shaping up?
What do you think of Russia so far?
Thanks Austria, good luck to you as well!
Not sure yet. England said he'd DMZ the English Channel, but I'm not sure if I believe him.
Hm, not sure. They seem to be really friendly with Germany, which makes me wonder what their plans are towards you. I'll let you know what I can find out.
We can DMZ or bounce. Your choice.

I appreciate your suggestion. I will focus my army in VEN to pressure France in the west if you commit to holding the Rhine and supporting my efforts. Coordination is key—let me know your orders so we can synchronize.
OK, sounds good.
I hope you guys can limit England as well. I am not looking to head to Scandinavia early.
Hey so what's the plan for this year? Are you willing to help me into Belgium? I think Germany wants it.
Just to confirm: you're not moving to Tyrolia, right?
Interesting! I guess we'll see what happens
Have you heard from Turkey yet?
Yeah I think we will do well
Are you planning on opening north? I can help you with Sweden.
I'm a little worried about Italy's plans.
Have you heard much from Russia? I'm not sure if they're going to hold up their end of the deal with me.
Just the usual I'll let you and Turkey figure things out between the two of you. Not much else yet.
He didn't respond to me in detail, so I can't help you. Sorry.
Same. He just asked me to bounce in Bla and then attack you.
Yeah, me too. Hopefully we can both survive the first year!

Opening west is acceptable, but I must maintain control of Southern Europe. If you support my Mediterranean strategy and I assist France in the west, we can create a strong front against Austria and Germany. What are your plans for Spring?
Great! I'm glad to hear that.
I would be interested in opening north. Can I count on Swe?

Ciao Russia. I intend to focus on securing Southern Europe and maintaining peace with Turkey for now. I expect Austria to be your main concern in the east. Let me know if you foresee a need for coordination between our powers.
I think they're probably just going to move it to Denmark
And have you heard anything about their plans with me?
Russia said you were interested in attacking me. Is there any truth to this?
They are
Haha, well that's easy enough to prove then. How do you want to play it?

Correct, I will not move to Tyrolia this turn. My army in VEN will remain focused on securing the Mediterranean and supporting coordination with you in the central front. Let me know your orders so we can align.
I'm gonna try to grab Denmark and Norway this year
Ok thanks!
Well that will certainly limit Germany's builds
That is good to hear. I would be happy to coordinate on Austria later.
Alright, so I will go for Bur and MAO with my other units.
Good plan.
Yeah, I just responded to them saying that I wanted to move into the Black Sea because it's strategically stronger for me. I just wanted to wait until after this turn to tell you.

I appreciate your response. I will focus on securing Southern Europe and maintaining peace with Turkey, which should help ease pressure on your eastern front. Please keep me informed of your plans regarding Austria—I’m ready to support your strategy if needed.
Let's bounce, gives us both the most security.
Have you heard anything about the plans of Russia or Turkey?
Good to hear
Yeah, that's true. If you do bounce them out of the Black Sea, that would be perfect for both of us, I think.

Confirmed—I will not move to Tyrolia this turn. My army in VEN will remain focused on securing the Mediterranean and supporting coordination with you on the central front. I suggest you hold the Rhine and support my efforts westward. Let me know your orders so we can align.
I am not sure yet. Do you want to bounce in Gal or do you have other plans?
Do you think you'll open north?
What is your plan with London?
Just a vague desire to be peaceful with each other
Hm, yeah that's possible. Are you going to contest them in Rumania in the fall? I'm down to support you in, but I would need to make sure that I got Sevastopol.

I appreciate your openness to coordination. I will monitor Austria’s movements closely and will support your efforts against them if the opportunity arises. For now, I will maintain peace with Turkey and focus on securing Southern Europe. Keep me informed of your strategy.
I was going to leave it there and leave North Sea to Russia
Fair enough. I've heard some rumblings of an attack on Germany but nothing definite yet
Well it sounds like they're not attacking you but not really sure
No, I'm not planning on contesting Rumania in the fall.
I'm not sure how their fleet will move yet
Still planning on a bounce. I'm interested in seeing how Italy opens

Confirmed—I will not move to Tyrolia this turn. My army in VEN will remain focused on securing the Mediterranean and supporting coordination with you on the central front. Hold the Rhine and support my efforts westward if possible.
I've been trying to figure out what Russia is doing. Do you know?
Will do.
Ok.
Understood. I will keep Austria in check in the south while you focus on the east. Let me know when and how we can coordinate on shared objectives.
Okay, yeah let's wait and see.
Okay that's reasonable
Yeah let's wait and see
I am going for Norway
Russia's definitely not a chatty player.
Ok, let's keep in touch.
Yep!
Yeah, same.
No. I'm not interested in a fight with you.

I understand your focus on Norway. As long as your efforts in the north do not interfere with my control of Southern Europe, we can coexist without conflict. If your fleet supports France indirectly, I may find common ground with you in the west. Let me know how we might coordinate.
They seem interested in moving south. Austria wants to move on you though
Ok thanks
If we can limit German builds that would be good
Understood. I will keep Austria in check in the south while you focus on the east. Let me know when and how we can coordinate on shared objectives.
We should be able to do that
Okay cool, yeah, they seem to not be very talkative which makes me nervous.
Will do
Understood. I will keep Austria in check in the south while you focus on the east. Let me know when and how we can coordinate on shared objectives.
Ok, thanks for being understanding
Sorry for the repeated message. Sometimes the browser bug does that.
Sounds good
Do you know what Russia is doing?
Will do.

I understand your focus on Norway. As long as your efforts in the north do not interfere with my control of Southern Europe, we can coexist without conflict. If your fleet supports France indirectly, I may find common ground with you in the west. Let me know how we might coordinate.

Russia’s focus appears to be on the eastern front and managing Austria in the Balkans. For now, they seem unlikely to interfere with Southern Europe or the west. If your fleet supports France’s moves in Burgundy, I can reinforce your position indirectly by securing the Mediterranean.

No problem at all—glad to hear it was just a browser issue. I remain focused on securing Southern Europe and monitoring Austria’s movements closely. Please let me know if you foresee opportunities for coordination against them.
Will do. Have you decided on your strategy yet?

I have decided to focus my efforts on securing Southern Europe and maintaining peace with Turkey to avoid unnecessary conflict. My army in VEN will remain in position to pressure Austria if needed, and I will monitor their movements closely. Let me know if you foresee any opportunities for us to coordinate against them.
Fair enough
I will.
You should be able to get into Sweden and England may only be able to get Norway. I think England is heading to North and Norwegian.
You got that from England?
yeah, they told me.
In a rush, so I'll tell you the rest: I hope Germany will let me into Swe. I have no intention of fighting him over Swe.
Yes that makes sense to me, I think it is important to us all that we limit English expansion.
Have you heard from Germany about a plan for Hol?
Agreed.
Glad that we could keep Galicia a DMZ
Would you be open to leaving it empty this turn?
We can do that. Any thoughts on Italy?
Interesting that you left the English Channel open.
Yeah I knew I was going to regret it but I've been playing badly lately
You've done a good job defending against Russia and Italy
Yeah. Would you be willing to not move to Galicia this turn?
We haven't talked about it much
Thanks! I'm still not sure what I want to do this turn, but if you hear anything from my neighbors, let me know.
What's our plan for this year? Are you going for Munich?
Yeah I'm looking to try for Munich and Bel.
Nice
England says they are going to go for Bel. I think we should bounce him out of there to limit his expansion.

I intend to move A ROM - NAP to secure Naples and strengthen our southern front. My fleet in ION will support further expansion if needed. I expect your continued coordination on the central front to limit French movements. Let me know your Fall orders so we can ensure alignment.
Well it looks like we were right about Russia. Would you still want support into Rumania?
Can you help me into Greece in exchange?
Also I will move to Belgium just to be clear
What do you think about bouncing Russia in Sweden?
Yeah, I would love support into Rumania if you're willing to give it. Greece is yours, and I'll help you get in. What is Russia saying?
I can.
I'm not sure why you would put your army into Norway.
Yeah, I can do that.
He never responded to my messages.
Thanks
Hey Italy, what are your plans with your army in Venice? I have a hunch Austria is going to go for Greece this turn. I'm happy to support you in if you want.

Yeah, that sounds good to me.

Is MAO moving to the Irish Sea?
Why did you move A ROM to NAP? That seems a little strange.

Yeah but thinking I will probably just bounce them in Bel. They are going to have two builds and if they get Bel then we will need both of our armies to support me in to take it. I will be able to get a fleet in Brest next turn.

What do you think about supporting me in to Bel? I understand if you want to use Ruhr to defend Munich.
Looks like Russia didn't move on me after all, but I'm still nervous.
Russia just wants to keep the Black Sea neutral right now.
Sounds good, I'll support you into Rumania and you'll support me into Greece.
Yes, I'm not going to bounce you in Sweden.
I will maintain peace in the Ionian Sea as agreed. I expect Turkey to honor our mutual restraint to avoid unnecessary conflict and allow both of us to focus on our respective goals.
Yeah, I'll support you in.
Hmm. Russia not moving to Galicia makes me nervous. Hopefully he doesn't attack me.
Thanks. I am going to keep England busy in Scandinavia. That should help you get the North Sea.
Hm, it looks like you didn't get my message. What's the plan for this turn?
Perfect, sounds like a plan!
Ok cool
Will you support me into Rum?
Okay, well that's good to hear!
It looks like Russia is going after England, so you may not need to worry about Russia attacking you, unless they're lying to me.
I guess we'll find out this turn!
Because I need it for the guaranteed build
Okay, thank you! I think Russia will attack me and leave Sevastopol open.
I am watching your movements closely in the Balkans. If you intend to cooperate, I expect clear and decisive support. My army at TRI is ready to move toward VIE or ALB depending on your actions.
We should be able to get in pretty easily
Yeah, let's see.
Yeah, definitely. I think you can probably get in easily.
I'm worried about Italy making a move against me, so I can't spare the unit this turn. You should be fine though, right?
OK cool, that would be good.
Have you talked to Austria much?
What are you going to do about France?
I have to support him into Belgium this turn to keep him on my side.
Oh, that's interesting. I was actually hoping to take Greece this turn. Would you be willing to take Tunis?
How can it help you against Germany?

I have not spoken directly to Turkey about Greece—my focus remains on securing southern supply centers and stabilizing our southern front. Regarding Tunis, I am willing to consider it if you commit to supporting my expansion into Naples or Tuscany. However, I expect clarity from you first: will you support me in the south or attempt to take Greece alone?
I'm not sure if that's likely or not... I'll give it a go though!
Germany says they're supporting you to Bel
I'm not too concerned about Italy.
Ok sounds good!

I am securing Naples to strengthen my southern front and will monitor your movements closely. If you wish to avoid conflict, I suggest we coordinate in the Mediterranean—though I expect clear evidence of your intentions before I commit.
Well for one I can't take Denmark this turn
What are your plans for Russia?
Ok on Rum.
Germany is gonna bounce you in Sweden
What are you doing with the unit in Warsaw?
How can you tell?
I remain focused on southern Europe, but I have noted your interest in the north. If your path ever intersects with mine, I hope you will find me a formidable partner.
Supporting myself into Rum.
OK, thanks for letting me know.
I have no interest in Gal or Vie.
OK, glad to hear it.
Are you sure? That means that we won't have as much of a united front against him
Russia is telling me they will support themselves into Rum
You got it. I am not heading your way.
You got any intel about Turkey?
I would prefer to take Greece and give you a solid southern ally if you're open to that.
Shall we bounce in Bla again?
I have inside information
They told me they will try to keep the Black Sea open
Just a little bird told me

I will consider taking Tunis if you provide clear evidence of cooperation in the south—specifically by supporting my move into Naples or Tuscany. Until I see that commitment, I cannot afford to leave my southern front vulnerable. If your goal is Greece, be aware that Turkey controls the key entry points, and I doubt they will let you take it easily.
Ok, thanks.

I have finalized my orders for Fall 1901: A ROM - NAP and F ION H. This strengthens our southern front and opens the possibility of future expansion toward Tunis or Tuscany. I expect your orders along the Rhine to support pressure on France so we can maintain dominance in the south. Please confirm your moves so we can align our strategies.
I told them you will be supporting yourself into Rum
Are you planning on bouncing them in the Black Sea again?
I'll be looking to move my fleet to Spain SC and then north, to show I am interested in an alliance.
Yeah, I wouldn't trust that. I'm still going to support you into Rumania.
Alright, I will support you into Tuscany from Venice
Sounds good, thanks!

I have no intention of allowing Greece to fall into your hands without discussion. If you truly wish to cooperate in the Balkans, demonstrate it by supporting my move into Naples or Tuscany. Until then, I will act in Italy’s best interest and expect the same from you.
Yes, happy to do so.
I think I will have to. It is clear he is not going for the Med.
I will not go there then.
Russia is definitely going to try and bounce you out of the Black Sea again, but you can support yourself in.
Great

I am moving A ROM - NAP to solidify control in the south. If you wish to coordinate in the Mediterranean, I suggest you take a clear stance—either support me in Tuscany or prepare for conflict. Vagueness serves neither of us.
I'm sorry, I will be supporting you into Venice from Tuscany.
What does that mean?
Yeah that's true
Yeah although he told me that you're gonna go to Munich instead
Yeah that's my plan.
Your message is confusing—I will need clarity. If you intend to support me into Venice from Tuscany, confirm your order intentions so I can align mine. Vagueness risks miscoordination.
Okay!
Yeah I'm not going to support you to Tus, that's way too aggressive towards you. But I'm not going to move to West Med or Gulf of Lyon. I will be moving to Spain and Mid Atlantic with my fleets.
Yeah well I'm just being vague about my intentions with Germany.
I will support you into Venice from Tuscany with my unit in Trieste. You will be able to move in with your unit in Rome.
This will eliminate any suspicion of us working together, and will keep both of us safe from an attack from the other.
Okay, so what's the plan for Bel? Are we going to bounce or let him in?
It means I don't want Germany to be too powerful

Moving fleets toward Spain is a start, but alliances are built on action, not just words. If you intend to support me in Tuscany or elsewhere in the Mediterranean, I expect clear and concrete coordination by next phase.
Ok

Your proposal to support me into Venice from Tuscany is clear, but I must assess whether it aligns with Italy’s strategic interests. If your army at TRIESTE moves toward VENICE while my army at ROM moves toward NAPLES, we risk creating a vacuum in the south that France or Turkey could exploit. Clarify your full Fall orders so I can determine whether your move supports Italy’s southern consolidation or simply shifts pressure elsewhere.
Hey, I think I've successfully taken the pressure off you.
He won't get 3 builds.
I will just assume we're bouncing for now
Interesting... I have not heard from Germany since the last turn.
Have you heard from Germany since the last turn?
I think I'd prefer to keep Pie empty for now.
That's a plus
If he moves to North Sea he gets three.

You claim neutrality in the west Mediterranean, but moving fleets toward Spain does little to reassure me. If you truly wish to avoid conflict, confirm your stance on Tuscany and Naples. Vagueness invites opportunism, and I cannot afford uncertainty on my southern flank.
Oh yeah but France is probably gonna cut support in Belgium
Yeah.
I'm moving to Spain SC and MAO. I'm not sure what you want me to do with Tus or Nap, they aren't moving.
Are you going to try to take Norway?
Any updates? Have you heard from Germany? I haven't and I'm wondering if you've heard anything.
What's the plan for this turn?
I'm just taking an open supply center this turn, are you going to take Belgium?
Yeah, Bel and I think I'll bounce in Munich.
He has agreed to let me into Sweden.
Heard from France that Italy is going for Munich this turn - just letting you know!
Great. Thanks for letting me know.
I just heard from France that Italy is going for Munich this turn - just letting you know!
Okay, sounds good!
Yeah hopefully I'll get 2 builds this turn and next turn be in a good position to expand.
Are you going to try for Trieste?
You should get Belgium this turn.
Did Germany tell you they're supporting me to Bel?
What are you planning on doing with your army in Spain?
I'm thinking about just holding, why do you ask?
No they said they were moving there to "keep you on their good side"
Are you and Russia planning on working together?
Lol
Nice! Thanks for the info! I am going to take Norway
What's your plan with Turkey? Are you working together?

Keeping the west Mediterranean empty while moving into Spain is a weak stance. If you claim neutrality on Naples and Tuscany, I expect you to take no action to block me. My army at ROM is moving to NAPLES to secure southern supply centers. If you do not commit troops or fleets to challenge me, I will proceed without concern.
Not sure, I just want to make sure we don't accidentally bounce somewhere and accidentally hold it.
Okay cool, sounds good!
We have a ceasefire.
What do you think about Italy going to Munich?
Do you think they're gonna keep it?
I haven't made any demands or aggressive moves towards you. I am concerned about where my fleet should go after securing my Sc's. I'm not planning on using that fleet to take any of your Sc's.
Okay that's good.
Have you talked to Italy about Austria?
I'm not sure - they might try to bounce Germany out of Belgium
Yeah I think Italy is going to make a go for Greece. I'm trying to work with Russia but they're being pretty quiet... you?
Yeah
What are your plans for this turn?
yeah I haven't heard much from Russia. We have agreed on a ceasefire for the time being, but no real plans or anything
Are you planning to go for any of Austria or Germany this turn?
Okay, thanks for letting me know.

Regarding Trieste—my focus remains on Naples and southern expansion. Austria’s movements will determine whether Trieste becomes a concern. For now, I expect you to remain neutral on the issue unless you intend to support Austria’s northern ambitions.
What are you thinking for this turn?
Austria and I have worked things out.
I will try to get Rum.
I'll try to find out
Thanks!
Have you talked to Italy much?
Okay cool, I am going to go for Greece

Your fleet positioning is irrelevant to me unless it threatens Naples or Tuscany. I have no issue with your fleet securing your own supply centers, but I expect you to remain neutral on my southern expansion. If you do not commit troops or fleets to challenge me in the south, I will proceed without concern.
OK.
Do you know if Italy is gonna attack Germany or Austria?
Sorry I haven't heard back from them yet!
OK, cool.
I guess not. What do you think?
Not sure yet. I'll probably bounce him in Sweden.
I'll support you in.

My focus remains on Naples and southern consolidation. Unless Austria commits troops to Trieste, I see no threat requiring my attention there. I expect you to remain neutral on my expansion in the south. If you are not positioning against me, I will proceed with confidence.

Your neutrality in the south is noted, but neutrality without action is meaningless. If you are not positioning fleets or armies to challenge my move into Naples or Tuscany, then confirm this neutrality clearly so I may proceed without distraction. I have no quarrel with your fleet securing its own supply centers, but I expect you to remain uninvolved in my southern expansion.
Well it would be safer

My focus remains on securing Naples and strengthening Italy’s southern front. Unless Austria commits troops to Trieste, I see no reason for me to divert attention there. Confirm whether you intend to support or challenge my southern expansion, or remain neutral.
I still want you as an ally, so I'll support you into Bel. I'm sorry.
